items.name: Google Antigravity

items.name: GitWit

items.name: Windsurf

items.name: Theia IDE
items.description: An extensible open-source IDE (web and desktop) providing AI-powered features like chat, code completion, terminal assistance and custom agents using arbitrary LLMs. Built on , a platform designed to enable the creation of custom, AI-powered tools and IDEs.

items.name: Theia AI
items.description: An extensible open-source IDE (web and desktop) providing AI-powered features like chat, code completion, terminal assistance and custom agents using arbitrary LLMs. Built on , a platform designed to enable the creation of custom, AI-powered tools and IDEs.

items.name: OneCompiler

Scans for broken YAML frontmatter, rule conflicts, redundancies, missing alwaysApply, token budget issues, and stack coverage gaps. Available as CLI (`npx cursor-doctor scan`) and VS Code extension.

items.description: Open-source Go CLI that tracks AI API quota usage across 7 providers (Anthropic, OpenAI Codex, GitHub Copilot, Synthetic, Z.ai, MiniMax, Antigravity). Background daemon with Material Design 3 web dashboard, ~15MB binary, <50MB RAM, zero telemetry.

items.description: CLI tool that generates AI coding rules from your actual codebase using Google Gemini. Feeds source files into Gemini's 1M token context window to produce project-specific rules for Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, and Windsurf. Zero dependencies.

items.name: Trelent
items.description: A VS Code extension to generate docstrings. Uses proprietary models.

items.name: DiagramGPT
items.description: DiagramGPT is a free AI-based web app that converts a schema, infrastructure definition, code snippet or plain language description into diagrams. The tool can generate flow charts, entity relationship diagrams, cloud architecture diagrams and sequence diagrams.

items.name: DocuWriter.ai
items.description: AI-powered web app to generate automated Code & API documentation from your source code files.

items.name: README-AI
items.description: Automated README.md file generator, powered by large language model APIs.

items.name: Supacodes
items.description: An AI tool that automates writing & updating code documentation in Github.

items.name: CodexAtlas
items.description: Automated code and API documentation using latest AI models.

items.name: EkLine
items.description: Helps software teams create and maintain high-quality documentation with AI-powered quality checks, style guide enforcement, and automatic doc generation.

items.name: Changenotes
items.description: AI-powered changelog generator. Connects to GitHub, auto-generates categorized changelogs from commits and PRs on every release. Free tier available, Pro $9/mo.

items.name: TraceRoot AI
items.description: An AI native observability tool that using AI agents to automatically fix your production bugs.

items.name: ChatWithGit
items.description: Enables ChatGPT to search GitHub and return links to relevant repositories.

items.name: Code ChatGPT Plugin
items.description: Open source example of a ChatGPT plugin that pulls context from a directory of files.

items.name: Bloop
items.description: Natural language search for repositories.

items.name: Buildt
items.description: Natural language search for repositories. Waitlist.

items.name: SeaGOAT
items.description: A local search tool leveraging vector embeddings to search your codebase semantically.

items.name: ContextMCP
items.description: Self-hosted semantic search across documentation from various sources for AI agents.

items.name: Checksum AI
items.description: End-to-end fully autonomous QA Automation agent that generates CI/CD ready Playwright tests directly to the repository

items.name: OctoMind
items.description: Auto-maintenance and generated browser-based end-to-end-tests integrated into Github Actions, Azure DevOps and more.

items.name: Traceloop
items.description: Uses OpenTelemetry tracing data with generative AI to improve system reliability.

items.name: Carbonate
items.description: End-to-end testing using natural language. Integrates into your existing test suite (currently Jest, PHPUnit and Python's unittest).

items.name: Meticulous.ai
items.description: Automatically generated, automatically maintained end-to-end tests: as your app evolves so does your test suite.

items.name: DiffBlue
items.description: Automatically generated unit tests for Java.

items.name: Qodo
items.description: Non-trivial test generation with support for major programming languages. Extensions for VS Code and JetBrains. (formerly Codium)

items.name: DeepUnit
items.description: Thoughtful test cases and generation of complete unit test files. Available as an interactive VS Code extension, npm package, CLI or CI/CD pipeline.

items.name: MutahunterAI
items.description: Accelerate developer productivity and code security by finding vulnerabilities in code and generating tests for them. Open Source and available as a CLI or CI/CD pipeline.

items.name: KushoAI
items.description: AI agent for API testing which transforms your Postman collections, OpenAPI specs, curl commands, etc. into exhaustive test suites that plug into your CI/CD pipeline.

items.name: Test Gru
items.description: Provides enterprise-level unit test automation services.

items.name: AgentsKB
items.description: Expert knowledge layer for AI assistants. Your AI searches, we research. That's the difference.

items.name: sniffbench
items.description: Benchmark suite for evaluating coding agents. Compare configurations, track metrics, and A/B test with real issues from your repos.

items.name: Skills Hub
items.description: Community-rated marketplace for GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Claude AI coding instructions. Browse and share quality-scored `copilot-instructions.md`, `.cursorrules`, and `CLAUDE.md` configurations organized by tech stack.

items.name: aiforcode.io
items.description: Expert-curated directory of 42+ AI coding tools with transparent 100-point scoring, head-to-head comparisons, and an interactive tool recommendation quiz. Verified monthly.

items.name: Awesome Code Docs
items.description: Curated deep-dive tutorials for open-source AI and developer tooling projects.

items.name: Cursor Rules Collection
items.description: 35+ production-quality .cursorrules files for 16 frameworks including React, Next.js, Python, Go, Rust, SvelteKit, and Django. Configure AI coding assistants with code style, architecture, and testing conventions. MIT licensed.

items.name: AI Coding Compare
items.description: Compare 50+ AI coding assistants with features, pricing, and performance benchmarks.

items.name: Havoptic
items.description: Free, open-source timeline tracking releases from AI coding tools. Auto-updated daily.
